items.definition_en: A person you know well and like.
items.example_en: My friend helped me with my homework.

items.definition_en: A person who guides or is in charge of others.
items.example_en: She is the leader of our group.

items.definition_en: Someone who gives support or assistance.
items.example_en: He is a good helper in the kitchen.

items.definition_en: A person you do not know.
items.example_en: A stranger asked me for directions.

items.definition_en: A person who sees the good side of things.
items.example_en: My brother is a real optimist.

items.definition_en: A person who often expects bad things.
items.example_en: He is known as a pessimist at work.

items.definition_en: A person who is quiet and likes being alone.
items.example_en: She is an introvert and enjoys reading.

items.definition_en: A person who likes meeting people.
items.example_en: Mike is an extrovert and loves parties.

items.definition_en: A person who lives near you.
A person who likes to make jokes.
items.example_en: He is the joker of the class.

items.definition_en: A person who thinks about exciting things.
items.example_en: He has always been a dreamer.

items.definition_en: A person who enjoys thinking deeply.
A person who pays attention when others talk.
A person who spends time with you.
items.example_en: My dog is my best companion.

items.definition_en: A person who finishes first or succeeds.
items.example_en: He was the winner of the contest.

items.definition_en: A person who does not win.
items.example_en: No one likes to be a loser.

items.definition_en: A person who talks a lot.
items.example_en: My little sister is a real chatterbox.

items.definition_en: A person who hurts or frightens others.
items.example_en: No one likes a bully at school.
